cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Cliffette's History is a BG1 quest mod. cdtweaks #1160/#1161 (Multiple Strongholds) modifies BG2 stronghold scripts. Unlikely to have actual file-level conflict across game phases. Kept as informational.
conflicts.source: Cliffette's History is BG1 phase only. cdtweaks Multiple Strongholds modifies BG2 stronghold assignment. Cross-phase conflict unlikely, 2026-03

sum: Adds a quest at the Five Flagons Playhouse involving a character named Fonick, originally designed for a history-themed modding contest with multiple endings.
no: Adds a quest at the Five Flagons Playhouse involving a character named Fonick, originally designed for a history-themed modding contest with multiple endings.

co.no: PARSE ERRORS (non-fatal): CLFAR0510.baf and clfhswz1.baf use raw text strings in AddJournalEntry/EraseJournalEntry instead of STRREF integers. Fonick 'Bard out of Hell' journal entries won't display correctly. Also 3 PARSE WARNINGs in history.d for the same reason. Mod installs and quest works, just journal text is broken.
